message:
test(conformance): add elf_loader, iconv, memcpy, strlen harnesses

Add conformance test harnesses for four fixture families:
- elf_loader: header parsing, relocations, hash, symbol table (11 tests)
- iconv_phase1: iconv_open, iconv, iconv_close, error codes (11 tests)
- memcpy_strict: full/partial/zero/single-byte copy (10 tests)
- strlen_strict: empty/single/longer string lengths (9 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
